2.1.numbering_rule: 0.x metadata; 1.x identity/purpose; 2.x counting/trace; 3.x member references; 4.x growth hooks.
2.2.trace_role: Layer-level index file; member details live in separate files.
3.1.member_reference_strategy: One JSON file per member in later bundles.
4.1.future_growth: Add member references and batch-derived augmentations without merging into a giant file.
